mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bl_bill WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bl_bill WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status = 'OVERDUE' AND del_flag = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) AS paidAmount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS paidCount FROM bl_bill WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND billing_period = #{month} AND del_flag = 0 AND status NOT IN ('CANCELLED')
